data.title: Trump Pressures Fed To Cut Interest Rates As 'Liberation Day In America' Looms
data.description: Trump pressures Fed for rate cut, calling tariffs Liberation Day. Fed signals economic uncertainty, lower growth forecasts, higher inflation.

data.title: What's Going On With Five Below Stock Thursday?
data.description: Five Below Inc (NASDAQ:FIVE) shares are trading higher Thursday after the company reported better-than-expected financial results for the fourth quarter and issued strong first-quarter guidance.

data.title: FactSet Surpasses Q2 Earnings Estimates, Raises FY25 Revenue Outlook Amid Client Growth
data.description: FactSet reported Q2 earnings of $4.28 per share, surpassing estimates, and raised its FY25 revenue outlook amid strong client growth.

data.title: OptiNose Stock Is Soaring Today: What's Going On?
data.description: OptiNose Inc (NASDAQ:OPTN) shares are trading higher Thursday after Paratek Pharmaceuticals announced a deal to acquire the company.

data.title: Oracle Expands Microsoft Partnership, Enhances Cloud Offerings
data.description: Oracle Corp. disclosed contracts and product enhancements, including Exadata Database Service on Exascale Infrastructure, easier management and pay-as-you-go pricing, and boosted employee experience.
